description: Real anonymised parent WhatsApp messages (one family, 2023-2026) from the firstchord-assistant chat export, relabelled 2026-07-06 into the dashboard incoming-message categories. Labels are the operationally correct category (what the admin should do), curated by hand — the old dataset labels were noisy. Used by incoming-classifier-eval.test.mjs.

messages.text: Hi all, just a small note: the name is [NAME]. Looking forward to the 6th. Kind regards
messages.label: general

messages.text: Great! See you later
messages.label: general

messages.text: Dear [NAME], dear [NAME], [NAME] was very happy of how the piano lesson went today. We would like therefore to go ahead and have a regular class every week. We would like to go for Tuesdays at 5.15pm if possible, starting in two weeks. Next Tuesday we will be out of Glasgow and cannot attend. Looking forward to finalise this. Kind regards. [NAME]
messages.label: schedule

messages.text: Hi [NAME], that seems too late for us, is the 4.15 slot on Mondays still available?
messages.label: schedule

messages.text: Ok so let’s get onto Monday starting next week if possible
messages.label: schedule

messages.text: Thank you, I have set up the direct debit
messages.label: payment

messages.text: Hi [NAME], we are looking to buy a keyboard just to begin with and we would like to ask some comments about the one here below. Thanks, [NAME] https://www.amazon.co.uk/Blackstar-Portable-Rechargeable-Keyboard-BA203010/dp/B08M1L9KNJ/ref=asc_df_B08M1L9KNJ/?tag=googshopuk-21&linkCode=df0&hvadid=[PHONE]&hvpos=&hvnetw=g&hvrand=[PHONE]2230&hvpone=&hvptwo=&hvqmt=&hvdev=m&hvdvcmdl=&hvlocint=&hvlocphy=9046941&hvtargid=pla[PHONE]&psc=1&th=1&psc=1
messages.label: general

messages.text: Thank you! We’ll look into it
messages.label: general

messages.text: Hi [NAME]! No problem thank you for letting us know. Kind regards. [NAME]
messages.label: general

messages.text: Good evening, I wanted to anticipate the plans for [NAME]’s piano lesson: he will be away during the summer, I.e. starting in two weeks and will be back mid august. At that time we would like to resume his piano lessons, possibly at the same day and time as now. Is this something that works? Thanks, [NAME]
messages.label: summer_break

messages.text: Hi [NAME], actually we would like to break from today, i.e. not lesson today, and resume on August 14th. Does this work with you?
messages.label: extended_absence

messages.text: No problem. The performance went fine. He was a little scared but he managed well! Thanks a lot and see you after the break
messages.label: general

messages.text: Hi [NAME], I hope all is good with you, I would like to confirm that we would like to resume [NAME]’s piano lessons starting in monday 14th. Is this alright? Kind regards. [NAME]

messages.text: Thank you!
messages.label: general

messages.text: He should let me check

messages.text: He was unwell today but he told me he was coming to piano

messages.text: Is he there? I am not able to talk to my wife

messages.text: Good evening [NAME], I just wanted to check on the payment since I know that [NAME] is on holiday but I saw trhe payment being charged on the direct debit. Thanks. [NAME]

messages.text: ok thanks!

messages.text: Hi [NAME], I wanted to let you know that unfortunately [NAME] cannot make it to the class on Monday. Apologies for the short notice. Kind regards

messages.text: Hi [NAME] sorry to bother again, but this Monday [NAME] still cannot come to the lesson. I was wondering if I also need to message [NAME] for the payments. Thanks ‎[17/11/2023, 10:06:27] First Chord Music School: Hi guys, hope [NAME] is ok  apologies I missed this! Just a reminder around the lessons cancellations policy from the handbook for future 😀. I’ll pause it this time though! ‎image omitted
